name: Albatross Screen Golf
address: 638 Columbia St Ext Ste 2, Latham, NY 12110
about: Albatross Screen Golf in Latham, NY, offers a seamless blend of physical and digital golf experiences using ImpactVision Golf Technology. The facility features Full HD, ultra-realistic course simulations with multi-sensor fidelity for authentic swing and ball tracking. Pricing is structured on a per-bay-hour basis, with standard rates of $50/hour on weekends and after 4pm on weekdays, and $40/hour on weekdays before 4pm. The venue caters to individuals looking for a premium simulation experience, with a strong emphasis on data-driven feedback for skill improvement and a lefty-friendly policy available by phone for specific bays.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge ImpactVision technology with Full HD realism
Data-driven feedback for precise swing analysis
Dynamic weather simulation for realistic play conditions
Dedicated left-handed bays available by request
Membership options for regular players and priority booking
